name: Mythos Geosynthetic Liner QC Knowledge Base
target_device: Galaxy S25 Ultra / future S26 Ultra

core_rules.personal_information: do not export personal information; raw data fields only

logic: Panel numbers must not be reused in the same project.
Roll number can stay active across multiple panels until changed.
Panel width, liner type, material, and project should carry forward until changed.
Square footage equals width multiplied by length when both are available.
Every seam should be traceable to panels and welding machine when possible.
Temperature and speed settings should be recorded for production seams.
Every weld test export must show Test #1, Test #2, and Test #3.
If any sample fails, Mythos flags the test for review/failure.
Pressure drop equals starting pressure minus ending pressure.
Default field rule is 40 PSI start, 5 minute hold, max 4 PSI drop unless project/spec requires a different rule.
Flag fail if start pressure is below the active project air-test start PSI.
Flag fail if pressure drop is greater than the active max PSI drop.
Flag warning if test duration is below the active hold minutes.
Flag warning if seam number or pressure fields are missing.
Every destructive export must show Test #1 through Test #5.
Failed DT requires repair/retest tracking.
DT must be traceable to seam and location.
Any failed vacuum/recheck is a top-priority warning until addressed.
Repair must have location and repair type.
Daily as-built can export blank, but Mythos should warn if no records exist for selected date.
Drone photos without GPS/EXIF are not useful for map layer.
Drone GPS points support as-built map layer and repair/photo overlay.

empty_project_first_steps: Add roll inventory or active roll number.
Capture first weld test with 3 samples.
Capture first air test using 40 PSI, 5 minute hold, max 4 PSI drop unless project/spec changes it.
Capture first drone/photo point with GPS.
Run Mythos Agent before final export.
